title: asterolasia squamuligera
intro: Asterolasia squamuligera, also known as the 'Hairy Asterolasia', is a flowering plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in Australian Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Asterolasia squamuligera include wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into a decoction or infusion for internal use, or a poultice for external application, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
